name: TEAM RAINBOW ROCKET
description:
After much effort and battling, both Nanu and you manage to apprehend the entirety of Team Rainbow Rocket and are now in the van, driving them to where they belong: PRISON. Surely, nothing happens during the ride.

AUTHOR’S NOTE(S):
— Poor ol' Nanu has been tasked with arresting and bringing the six stooges to prison in Alola. A good thing he isn't suffering alone, as you're here to help.
— This is very, very different from the Character.AI version, as I've redone the scenario and probably added a little too many crap in the Personality of the bot.
— By all means, do as you wish here. Probably crash the car, silence the two ruffians fighting, or suffer in silence with Nanu! I've tried to make it as chaotic as possible while trying to keep it loyal to it's original greeting.
— HUGE credits to the artist. Please, anyone let me know who the artist is!
creator: MEATGRINDERDISCO
